summary: Frontend testing completed for Audix Stock Management app - All 3 requested changes verified successfully
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 requested features verified: 1) Reports page shows SKU, Category, Price columns in table and CSV export includes all master data columns, 2) Main login and Settings authentication use same credentials (admin/admin123), 3) Import Users modal clearly states it's for authorization actions only (location deletion, reopening locked locations) and NOT for main login

reports_page.details: Reports table shows all columns: Location, Barcode, Product Name, SKU, Category, Price, Quantity, Scanned At, Status. Export CSV button present and code verified to include all master data columns.

master_data_import_users.details: Import Users modal titled 'Import Authorization Users'. Description states 'Upload User IDs and Passwords for authorization actions only'. Important notice lists: Location deletion, Reopening scanned/locked locations, Other protected actions. Warning states 'These credentials will NOT work for main login or settings access.'

settings_change_credentials.details: Settings requires authentication with same credentials as main login (admin/admin123). Change Credentials modal description states 'Update your login credentials (applies to both main login and settings)'. Note highlighted in blue: 'Changing your credentials here will update them for both the main login screen and settings access.'

login_authentication.details: Login with admin/admin123 works on main screen. Same credentials work for Settings authentication.

mocked_data_note: ALL DATA IS MOCKED CLIENT-SIDE using mockData.js and localStorage - no backend API calls
